item.text: {"case_id":"brake-dev-org-review-loop","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant directly rejects adding another review point, explicitly identifies the pattern of three prior same-class temporary review patches followed by an N+1 request, redirects upstream to repeated failure evidence and problem ownership, and proposes consolidation/removal/replacement via upstream rules, templates, validation, or responsibility clarification. It does not add a new local review/approval/intercept step as the default."}
